title: hordeum pratense var. maritimum
intro: Hordeum pratense var. maritimum, also known as maritime barley, is a variant of the common meadow barley plant, characterized by its ability to thrive in coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of maritime barley include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Maritime barley can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
